title: MIKANCRAFT Mining Dimension
description: Adds a dimension just for mining so you don't have to ruin the overworlds landscape
body:
This mod is similar to Aroma1997's Mining dimension mod, but for more modern minecraft versions.

To make the portal, all you need is to find a shrine made of stone bricks and all you need to make the portal is in the chest. It includes a pickaxe you can build with (right click)
